subcodes.first_line: ...He must study every day from morning till noon, so that he may learn how to read and write. From noon till about sunset he should acquire a craft
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر روز از صبح تا ظهر درس بخواند تا خواندن و نوشتن آموزد و از ظهر تا قریب غروب
subcodes.subjects: @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat], @education of children; moral education
